top_categories.workout_context: Ned Gravel's Colorado Rockies, Mountain gravel forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 70 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Ned Gravel's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before July.
8,300ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
119ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
At Ned Gravel, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
8,300ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Ned Gravel. Train it until it feels boring.
70 miles on Colorado mountain gravel burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Ned Gravel, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Base fitness for Ned Gravel. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
Low-cadence force work for 8,300ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on Colorado mountain gravel. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Ned Gravel’s 70 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Ned Gravel with 8,300ft of climbing, much of it above 8,000ft demands altitude preparation. Arrive 5–7 days early for acclimatization. Expect 5–15% power reduction at altitude. Increase iron intake 4 weeks out. Hydrate aggressively — altitude increases fluid loss by 20–40%. High altitude (8000+ feet).
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Ned Gravel requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on colorado mountain gravel to build confidence. Expect: colorado rockies, mountain gravel, high altitude.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Gravel Specific, Race Simulation, and VO2max to prepare you for 70 miles of colorado mountain gravel in Nederland, Colorado.
